name: ai-skills-marketplace
description: Jay McGavren's personal collection of AI skill plugins.

plugins.name: autonomy
plugins.description: Set up projects so future Claude Code sessions (attended or scheduled) can pick up pending work automatically.

plugins.name: retro-build
plugins.description: Build NES ROMs from 6502 assembly using ca65 + ld65 on macOS, and optionally launch the result in Mesen.

plugins.name: todo-sh
plugins.description: Read the user's personal to-do list via the todo-txt CLI (`todo.sh`).

plugins.name: rom-debug
plugins.description: Reverse-engineer retro games through romdev: map every player input to the code it triggers, and locate the RAM address behind any observable game value.
